About Arturo

A Realtor Who
Listens First

Arturo Bermeo has spent over a decade mastering every corner of the Houston real estate market — from the Energy Corridor to the Heights, Midtown to Sugar Land and beyond.

Whether acquiring your first home, expanding an investment portfolio, or positioning a premier property for sale, Arturo brings the expertise and discretion the moment demands.

  • Honest, transparent communication through every step
  • Unmatched knowledge of Houston neighborhoods and pricing
  • Dedicated advocacy from first showing through closing
  • Bilingual service — English and Spanish

Services

Expertise at
Every Stage

From your first conversation to the moment the keys are yours, every service is built around one thing — your outcome.

01
Home Buying

Complete guidance from first showing to closing — financing, negotiations, inspections handled with precision.

02
Home Selling

Strategic pricing, professional presentation, and targeted marketing for maximum return.

03
Investment Properties

Identify high-yield opportunities across Houston's corridors, backed by data-driven market analysis.

04
Relocation

Seamless transitions for families and executives moving to Houston — fully managed, even remotely.

05
Market Analysis

Complimentary CMAs to inform your timing, pricing strategy, and negotiation leverage.

06
New Construction

Expert buyer representation on new builds — upgrades negotiated, your interests protected.
